title: Packet 069 And Packet 070 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish Packet 069 local closeout authority and Packet 070 planning-only disjoint-scope verdict authority through the parent-root boundary, then restore `/home/olares/code/apex` to clean parity without treating authority publication as source/test execution, validation-surface decomposition execution, simultaneous multi-worker approval, migration approval, or second-worker authority.
dependency_note: Packet 069 published Packet 067 and Packet 068 authority in commit `a92e3fc40d2928edc2d4231b6feb6c5633c12cb6`; Packet 070 selected Branch B and recorded `no_current_true_disjoint_multi_worker_safe_source_test_slices` because the active operations-web browser lane still converges on the single shared `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts` validation surface.

any unrelated authority drift outside Packet 069 and Packet 070 closure surfaces
validation_steps: Confirm `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` branch, commit, and status count without mutation.
Stage only Packet 069 closeout authority, Packet 070 verdict authority, Packet 071 draft authority, routing, and roadmap updates required by this gate.
Run JSON parse checks and `git diff --cached --check` before committing.
Confirm no source, package, or lockfile paths are staged.
Commit and push the bounded authority publication.
Fast-forward `/home/olares/code/apex` non-destructively to the published commit and confirm status count 0.
preserved_boundaries: Authority publication is not source/test execution authority.
Packet 070's no-go verdict is not a permanent impossibility, but decomposition requires later explicit packetization.
No validation-surface decomposition execution opens in Packet 071.
No simultaneous multi-worker source/test execution opens in Packet 071.
No second mutation worker opens in Packet 071.
Installs and package-manager activation/download remain closed.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no source edits, source/test execution, validation-surface decomposition execution, simultaneous multi-worker mutation, migration approval, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, second-worker execution, slice widening, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
